stemHtml: What happens regarding your compass when flying in Northern Canada?

options.a: Unreliable compass and in the case of Inertial navigation no special procedure is required.
options.b: Due to reduced vertical field strength, the compass is unreliable.
options.c: Plot DR fix using a VOR, variation at aircraft must be applied.
options.d: Plot DR fix using NDB, variation at station must be applied.
